Document:
[color=#ffff00][head=3]Section 4: New-Life Rules[/head][/color]
[color=#a4885c]4.1[/color] Characters do not have any knowledge of what happened while they were dead, sleeping, or in critical condition. ★★
[color=#a4885c]4.2[/color] When a character is brought back to life, they cannot recall more than vague details of how they died. Examples: If you were shot, you only remember that you were shot, not who by. If you set yourself on fire, you remember burning and nothing more. ★
[color=#a4885c]4.3[/color] Do not respawn if your body or brain is still in the round and recoverable. Ahelp if you are unrevivable and would like to respawn. ★★
[color=#a4885c]4.4[/color] Characters who come back via respawn, as opposed to being revived by another character, are to act as a freshly joined participant to the round. They are not to use their metaknowledge to try and recover any assets. This includes ships and equipment. ★★
[color=#a4885c]4.4A[/color] Characters that respawn with a ship already loaded into the sector can work out IC, when they see a shipyard console or other method, and can take steps to recover their ship and deed.
[color=#a4885c]4.5[/color] You may enter Cryosleep and respawn as your character in instances where you are in a cloned body or otherwise not in your default character's body.
